over.title: About
over.description: As a software developer, I am always looking for new challenges. I am eager to learn and enthusiastic about discovering and trying out new programming languages. I am a team player and enjoy working together on projects, but I am also comfortable working independently. In short, I am always ready for whatever the next project has to offer. And who knows, maybe I will discover my new favorite programming language!

curio.description: In school, we also receive practical assignments, where we learn to work well together in a period of time, and get to know the business world.

company100.description: During my internship at Company 100, I was a full stack developer and worked with the CodeIgniter framework and their own CMS system to develop various web applications. I improved my styling skills using SCSS.

hobby.title: Hobbies
hobby.description: In my free time, I enjoy various hobbies. I love to exercise, so I spend time at the gym regularly. Additionally, I am also a passionate gamer and enjoy spending time playing video games. As a programmer, I also enjoy further developing my skills and experimenting with new technologies and programming languages.
